en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 65

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 65
Not my keys, not my body?
The right to self-possession, privacy, self-determination, to not be someone else’s property are all under direct assault. If you think they’re not coming for you next, it’s going to be a rough time.
If ever there was a time to fight for our fundamental, self-sovereign rights, this is it.
Is there anything better to build in a bear market, inflation crunch, upside down world trifecta than more direct ways to open up, take power and own social media?
Of course not. Decentralised social protocols like lens promise to break control by closed algorithms over the information we see and the culture we share.
What better way to build could there be.
With Layer X, this is a major component that DIGITALAX is integrating into every layer of the protocol.
If you freeze accounts under system stress and race for the exits in the hope of being bailed out by Goldman & co, you’re not really decentralized?

In some ways it feels like this controversy is stuck on repeat. In other way each week brings a clearer undeniable bright line dividing just how far laughable claims of plausible deniability can really go.

Sometimes I wonder whether even if the Ape founders stood on stage with racist salutes and said directly to the cameras exactly what they believe and how much they are taking the entire web3, NFT vibe industry for a ride, wether we would still give them a pass when yet again they said they are just doing it for the lols and don’t know why everyone’s reacting so harsh.

Why not just be up front and state specifically why you put such awful imagery in the collection and why you claim to be “pro-web3” whilst using all of the old corporate anti creative freedom weaponry when you file lawsuits hurling bags and lawyers at anyone standing in your way?
What’s great about the recent BAYC actions is that it’s becoming impossible for anyone really to keep making excuses for them.
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX Discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!

ar.title: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 65

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 65
من غير مفاتيحي، يبقى مش جسمي؟

ال right الى self-possession, privacy, self-determination, الى not be someone else’s property are all under direct assault. If you think they’re not coming لـ you next, it’s going الى be a rough time.
If ever there was a time الى fight لـ our fundamental, self-sovereign rights, this is it.
Is there anything better الى build في a bear market, inflation crunch, upside down world trifecta than more direct ways الى open up, take power و own سوشيال media?
من course not. Decentralised سوشيال protocols like لينز promise الى break control by closed algorithms over ال information we see و ال culture we share.
What better way الى build could there be.
مع Layer X, this is a major component that DIGITALAX is integrating into every layer من ال بروتوكول.
If you freeze accounts under system stress و race لـ ال exits في ال hope من being bailed out by Goldman & co, you’re not really decentralized?

في some ways it feels like this controversy is stuck على repeat. في other way each اسبوع brings a clearer undeniable bright line dividing just ازاي far laughable claims من plausible deniability can really go.

Sometimes I wonder whether even if ال Ape founders stood على stage مع racist salutes و said directly الى ال cameras exactly what they believe و ازاي much they are taking ال entire web3, NFT vibe industry لـ a ride, wether we would still give them a pass when yet again they said they are just doing it لـ ال lols و don’t know ليه everyone’s reacting so harsh.

ليه not just be up front و state specifically ليه you put such awful imagery في ال collection و ليه you claim الى be “pro-web3” whilst using all من ال old corporate anti ابداعي freedom weaponry when you file lawsuits hurling bags و lawyers at anyone standing في your way?
What’s great about ال recent BAYC actions is that it’s becoming impossible لـ anyone really الى keep making excuses لـ them.
